instruction: Write a polite reply to a customer whose delivery is one day late.
input: The rider had a breakdown, and the parcel will arrive tomorrow morning.
output: Hello, we sincerely apologise for the delay. Our rider had an unexpected breakdown, but your parcel is now scheduled for delivery tomorrow morning. We will keep you updated until it reaches you. Thank you for your patience.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Respond to a customer who received the wrong clothing size.
input: The customer ordered large but received medium. Offer a free exchange.
output: We are sorry about the mix-up with your order. You requested a large but received a medium. Kindly share your order number, and we will arrange an exchange at no extra cost.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Tell a customer politely that their bank transfer has not reflected.
input: The customer says payment was made fifteen minutes ago.
output: Thank you for the update. The transfer has not reflected on our account yet, and bank notifications can sometimes be delayed. Please send the payment receipt while we continue to check, and we will confirm once it reflects.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Reply in Nigerian Pidgin to a customer asking for an item that is out of stock.
input: Fresh stock is expected on Friday.
output: Thank you for your interest. The item don finish for now, but we dey expect fresh stock on Friday. If you like, we fit keep your contact and message you once e land.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Respond calmly to a customer whose product arrived damaged.
input: Ask for the order number, packaging photo, and product photo.
output: We are sorry the product arrived in that condition. Please send your order number and clear photos of both the packaging and the damaged item so we can review the issue and resolve it promptly.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain a refund timeline without promising an exact bank processing date.
input: The shop approved the refund today and will process it within two business days.
output: Your refund has been approved and will be processed from our end within two business days. After that, the time it takes to appear may depend on your bank. We will send confirmation once we complete the refund.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Tell a customer in Nigerian Pidgin that an order is ready for pickup.
input: Pickup closes at 6 p.m. and the customer should bring the order reference.
output: Your order don ready for collection. Abeg come before 6 p.m. with your order reference make we fit confirm am quickly. Thank you.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a courteous message rescheduling a client appointment.
input: Move the appointment from Tuesday at 2 p.m. to Wednesday at the same time and ask for confirmation.
output: Hello, please may we move your appointment from Tuesday at 2 p.m. to Wednesday at 2 p.m.? We apologise for the change. Kindly confirm whether the new time works for you.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Reply to a customer who says one item is missing from their order.
input: Ask for the order number and a photo of everything delivered.
output: We apologise that your order was incomplete. Kindly send your order number and a photo showing the items you received. We will check the packing record and get back to you with the next step.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Respond respectfully to a customer asking for a lower price.
input: The item costs ₦24,000, and the lowest approved price is ₦22,500.
output: Thank you for your interest. The listed price is ₦24,000, but the best approved price we can offer is ₦22,500. Please let us know if you would like us to reserve it for you.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a Pidgin update for a tailoring customer whose outfit is not ready.
input: The final fitting will be ready tomorrow afternoon.
output: We sorry say your outfit never ready as we plan. E go ready for final fitting tomorrow afternoon, and we go message you immediately we finish am. Thank you for your patience.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Answer a catering customer who asks whether a menu can accommodate allergies.
input: Ask for the specific allergies before confirming what can be prepared.
output: Thank you for checking with us. Please share the specific allergies and the number of affected guests. Our kitchen team will review the menu and confirm which options we can prepare safely before you place the order.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Apologise to a customer because the name on a celebration cake was misspelled.
input: Offer to correct the cake if there is enough time or discuss another remedy.
output: We sincerely apologise for misspelling the name on your cake. Please tell us when you need it, so we can confirm whether there is enough time to correct it. If not, we will contact you immediately to agree on a suitable remedy.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Tell a customer in Pidgin that the rider could not reach them.
input: Ask for an alternative phone number or nearby landmark.
output: Our rider don try call you, but the call no connect. Abeg send another phone number or one clear landmark near you make the rider fit locate you without further delay.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Respond to a customer reporting two debit alerts for one card payment.
input: The business can only see one successful payment and should ask for both references.
output: We understand your concern about the two debit alerts. Our record currently shows one successful payment. Please send both transaction references so we can compare them, and you may also contact your bank about any debit that did not settle with us.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a service update during a temporary internet outage.
input: Online orders cannot be confirmed until connectivity returns.
output: We are currently experiencing an internet outage, so online order confirmations may be delayed. We are recording incoming requests and will confirm each one as soon as connectivity is restored. We apologise for the inconvenience.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Reply to a customer asking whether a faulty item is covered by warranty.
input: Ask for purchase date, receipt, and a short video before making a decision.
output: Thank you for contacting us. Please send the purchase date, receipt, and a short video showing the fault. We will review them against the warranty terms and confirm the available solution; we cannot approve a warranty claim until the review is complete.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain a pre-order delay to a customer in Nigerian Pidgin.
input: The supplier moved the expected arrival from Monday to Thursday.
output: We sorry say your pre-order don delay. Our supplier don move the expected arrival date from Monday to Thursday. If Thursday no work for you, abeg let us know make we discuss the options wey dey available.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Answer a customer asking how to care for a handmade leather bag.
input: Advise them to keep it dry and clean it gently without making unsupported guarantees.
output: Please keep the bag away from prolonged moisture and direct heat. Wipe light dirt with a soft, dry cloth, and test any leather-care product on a small hidden area first. Contact us if you are unsure about a particular stain.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Reply to a customer asking about a discount for a bulk order.
input: Ask for quantity, preferred items, and delivery location before quoting.
output: Thank you for considering a bulk order. Kindly share the quantity, preferred items, and delivery location. Once we have those details, we will prepare the best available bulk quotation for you.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain an exchange requirement politely.
input: Unused footwear may be exchanged within seven days if the customer has the receipt and original packaging.
output: You may exchange the footwear within seven days, provided it has not been worn and you have the receipt and original packaging. Please send your order details before visiting so we can confirm that the replacement size is available.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Apologise in Pidgin to a salon client who has waited longer than expected.
input: The stylist will be available in twenty minutes.
output: We really sorry say you don wait pass the time wey we expect. The stylist go be available in about twenty minutes. If you no fit wait, abeg let us know make we help you choose another time wey go work for you.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Tell a restaurant customer that their chosen meal is unavailable.
input: Offer jollof rice with chicken or fried rice with fish as alternatives.
output: We apologise, but your selected meal is unavailable at the moment. We can offer jollof rice with chicken or fried rice with fish instead. Please let us know which option you prefer before we update the order.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Acknowledge a serious complaint and explain that it has been escalated.
input: A supervisor will review it and respond before noon tomorrow.
output: Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We are sorry about your experience. Your complaint has been escalated to a supervisor, who will review the details and respond before noon tomorrow.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Thank a customer for constructive feedback without claiming the issue is already fixed.
input: The customer said the checkout instructions were confusing.
output: Thank you for the honest feedback about our checkout instructions. We understand how the wording could be confusing, and we have shared your comments with the team for review. Your feedback will help us improve the process.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain the term invoice to a new business owner.
input: Keep the explanation practical and distinguish it from proof of payment.
output: An invoice is a document asking a customer to pay for goods or services. It normally shows the items, amounts, due date, and payment details. It is not proof that payment has already been made.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain the term receipt in Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Use an everyday shop example.
output: Receipt na proof say customer don pay for goods or service. For example, after person pay for something for shop, the receipt suppose show wetin the person buy, how much e pay, and the date wey e pay.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain what a quotation means in small business.
input: Mention that price or availability may have a validity period.
output: A quotation is a written offer showing the expected price and details of goods or services before an order is confirmed. It may include delivery charges, payment terms, and a date after which the price or availability can change.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain cash flow in simple Nigerian English.
input: Use a small food business as the example.
output: Cash flow is the movement of money into and out of a business. For a food vendor, customer payments bring money in, while ingredients, transport, rent, and wages take money out. Good cash-flow planning helps the business meet bills when they are due.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain profit without confusing it with sales revenue.
input: A trader sells ₦100,000 worth of goods and has ₦75,000 in related costs.
output: Profit is what remains after business costs are subtracted from sales revenue. In this simplified example, ₦100,000 in sales minus ₦75,000 in related costs leaves ₦25,000 profit. Sales alone do not show how much the business earned.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain markup in plain language.
input: A seller adds ₦3,000 to a product that cost ₦12,000.
output: Markup is the amount added to the cost price to set a selling price. If an item costs ₦12,000 and the seller adds ₦3,000, the selling price is ₦15,000. Markup should not be confused with profit margin.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain profit margin for Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Avoid giving financial advice.
output: Profit margin dey show how much of your sales money remain as profit after you remove the costs wey concern the sale. E fit help business owner compare how different products dey perform, but the calculation need include all the correct expenses.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain business turnover in simple terms.
input: Clarify that it is not the same as profit.
output: Turnover usually means the total value of sales a business makes during a stated period. It is not the same as profit, because expenses have not yet been removed from the turnover figure.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain working capital to a market trader.
input: Use stock and short-term bills as context.
output: Working capital is the short-term money available to keep daily operations moving. For a trader, it supports buying stock and paying near-term expenses while waiting for customers to pay. It is different from money set aside for long-term assets.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain inventory in Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Use a provision store as the example.
output: Inventory na all the goods wey business keep to sell or use. For provision store, things like rice, soap, and drinks wey dey shelf or store room all be part of the inventory.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain stock-taking to a small retailer.
input: Mention comparing physical quantities with records.
output: Stock-taking is the process of counting the goods physically available and comparing the count with the business records. It can reveal missing, damaged, expired, or incorrectly recorded items.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain wholesale and wholesale price.
input: Use cartons of drinks as a simple example.
output: Wholesale means selling goods in larger quantities, often to businesses that will resell them. A wholesale price is usually lower per unit than a retail price; for example, buying drinks by the carton may cost less per bottle.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain retail price in Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Contrast it briefly with wholesale price.
output: Retail price na the amount wey final customer dey pay when e buy small quantity, like one or two pieces. The price per item fit pass wholesale price because wholesale buyer dey usually buy plenty at once.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain a credit sale and its basic risk.
input: Do not present legal or financial advice.
output: A credit sale happens when a customer receives goods or services now and agrees to pay later. The business should record the amount, due date, and agreed terms clearly because late or missed payment can affect cash flow.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain payment terms of 60% upfront and 40% on completion.
input: Use a custom furniture order as context.
output: These terms mean the customer pays 60% of the agreed price before the furniture work begins and the remaining 40% when the work is completed under the agreed conditions. Changes, delivery, and cancellation terms should also be written clearly.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain minimum order quantity in Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Use the abbreviation MOQ in the explanation.
output: Minimum order quantity, or MOQ, na the smallest number of items wey supplier agree to sell for one order. If the supplier set the MOQ as 20 pieces, the buyer need order at least 20.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain what a waybill is in a Nigerian delivery context.
input: Avoid claiming it replaces all legal documents.
output: A waybill is a document that travels with goods during delivery. It can show the sender, receiver, items, quantities, and destination, helping both sides check what was dispatched and received.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain payment reconciliation in simple language.
input: Mention matching transfers, receipts, and orders.
output: Payment reconciliation means comparing bank or payment records with receipts, invoices, and customer orders. The aim is to confirm that each payment is recorded against the correct transaction and to investigate any difference.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain business overhead in Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Give examples that are not tied to one product.
output: Overhead na regular business cost wey no tie directly to any one product. Examples fit be shop rent, internet, security, and office support. Business need consider these costs when e dey set price.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Explain break-even point without making profit claims.
input: Use plain Nigerian English.
output: The break-even point is where total sales income equals total business costs for the period or product being measured. At that point, the business has covered those costs but has not yet made a profit.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this message from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Your order has been confirmed, and we will send the delivery details this evening.
output: We don confirm your order. We go send you the delivery details this evening.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this polite payment request from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Please send the payment receipt so that we can match it with your order.
output: Abeg send the payment receipt make we fit match am to your order.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this stock update from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: The black colour is available, but the brown one will arrive next week.
output: The black colour dey available, but the brown one go arrive next week.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this delivery message from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: The rider is close to your location. Please keep your phone nearby.
output: The rider dey close to your location now. Abeg keep your phone near you make e fit reach you.

instruction: Translate this apology from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: We are sorry that your package arrived late, and we appreciate your patience.
output: We sorry say your package arrive late. We really appreciate your patience.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this pickup notice from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Your clothes are ready for pickup after 3 p.m. today.
output: Your clothes go ready for collection after 3 p.m. today.

instruction: Translate this availability question from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Which size would you like us to reserve for you?
output: Which size you want make we reserve for you?

instruction: Translate this order correction from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: We noticed that the delivery address is incomplete. Please send the nearest landmark.
output: We don notice say the delivery address no complete. Abeg send the nearest landmark.

instruction: Translate this business-hours message from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: We have closed for today, but we will reply by 9 a.m. tomorrow.
output: We don close for today, but we go reply your message by 9 a.m. tomorrow.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this refund update from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: We have processed the refund and sent the confirmation to your email.
output: We don process your refund, and we don send the confirmation to your email.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this quotation message from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: The quotation covers materials and labour, but delivery is charged separately.
output: The quotation cover materials and labour, but delivery charge dey separate.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this reminder from English to Nigerian Pidgin without sounding harsh.
input: This is a friendly reminder that the remaining balance is due on Friday.
output: This na friendly reminder say you suppose pay the remaining balance on Friday. Thank you.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this exchange offer from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: If the shoes do not fit, you can return them unused for a different size.
output: If the shoes no size you, you fit return am without using am, make we give you another size.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this scheduling question from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Would Saturday morning or Monday afternoon be more convenient for you?
output: Between Saturday morning and Monday afternoon, which one go work better for you?
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this complaint update from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: We have sent your complaint to the manager and will update you tomorrow.
output: We don send your complaint to the manager. We go update you tomorrow.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this product question from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Please tell us the colour and quantity you need before we check the price.
output: Abeg tell us the colour and quantity wey you need make we check the price.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this collection instruction from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Bring your order number when you come to collect the package.
output: Abeg bring your order number when you dey come collect the package.

instruction: Translate this service update from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: The technician is still working on the repair and will call you when it is ready.
output: The technician still dey work on the repair. E go call you once e finish am.

instruction: Translate this sold-out notice from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Today's food trays are sold out. We can take bookings for tomorrow.
output: Food trays for today don finish, but we fit take bookings for tomorrow.

instruction: Translate this thank-you note from English to Nigerian Pidgin.
input: Thank you for supporting our small business. We hope you enjoy your purchase.
output: We really appreciate as you dey support our small business. We hope say you go enjoy wetin you buy.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin message into professional Nigerian English.
input: We never see the transfer for our side. Abeg send the receipt make we check am.
output: We have not yet received confirmation of the transfer. Please send the payment receipt so that we can check it.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin delivery update into professional Nigerian English.
input: Rider don comot, and e suppose reach you before 4 p.m.
output: The rider has left for your location and is expected to arrive before 4 p.m.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin stock message into professional Nigerian English.
input: The size wey you choose don finish, but medium still dey.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin apology into professional Nigerian English.
input: We sorry say we no reply early; plenty message enter today.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin pickup note into professional Nigerian English.
input: Your order don ready. You fit come carry am from tomorrow morning.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin request into professional Nigerian English.
input: Abeg confirm the name and phone number wey we go put for the package.
output: Please confirm the name and phone number that we should put on the package.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin price update into professional Nigerian English.
input: Delivery money no join the price; we go calculate am when you send location.
output: The price does not include delivery. We will calculate the delivery charge after you send your location.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin scheduling message into professional Nigerian English.
input: Friday don full, but Saturday afternoon still dey available.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin order question into professional Nigerian English.
input: You want make we package the two items together or separate?
output: Would you like us to package the two items together or separately?
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin repair update into professional Nigerian English.
input: We don check the phone, but we need your approval before we change the screen.
output: We have inspected the phone, but we need your approval before replacing the screen.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin food-order message into professional Nigerian English.
input: Soup go ready by 1 p.m. if you confirm the order this morning.
output: The soup will be ready by 1 p.m. if you confirm the order this morning.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin follow-up into professional Nigerian English.
input: We dey follow up to know whether you still need the quotation.
output: We are following up to ask whether you still need the quotation.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin exchange update into professional Nigerian English.
input: Once we receive the first one, we go send the replacement.
output: We will send the replacement after we receive the original item.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin service notice into professional Nigerian English.
input: Light no dey for the area, so the work fit delay small.
output: There is a power outage in the area, so the work may be slightly delayed.

instruction: Translate this Nigerian Pidgin appreciation message into professional Nigerian English.
input: Thank you as you recommend our business give your people.
output: Thank you for recommending our business to your friends and family.

instruction: Write a concise cover message for a catering quotation.
input: The quotation is for lunch for 60 guests on 18 September. The client should confirm menu changes by 10 September.
output: Dear Client, please find our quotation for lunch service for 60 guests on 18 September. Kindly review the menu and pricing, and send any requested changes by 10 September so we can confirm availability. Thank you for considering our service.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a friendly but professional overdue invoice reminder.
input: Invoice GL-204 was due three days ago. Ask the client to confirm payment status.
output: Good afternoon. This is a friendly reminder that invoice GL-204 was due three days ago. Kindly confirm the payment status or let us know if you need the invoice resent. Thank you.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Draft a clear order email to a supplier.
input: Order 40 cartons of bottled water and 15 cartons of soft drinks. Request delivery on Thursday and ask for confirmation.
output:
Subject: Stock Order for Thursday Delivery

Hello, we would like to order 40 cartons of bottled water and 15 cartons of soft drinks for delivery on Thursday. Please confirm availability, the total amount, and the expected delivery time before processing the order.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write the opening paragraph of a cleaning-service proposal.
input: The prospect is a small office in Ikeja seeking weekday cleaning.
output: Thank you for the opportunity to propose weekday cleaning services for your Ikeja office. Our aim is to provide a dependable cleaning schedule suited to your workspace, staff hours, and agreed hygiene requirements. The following proposal outlines the scope, timing, and pricing for your review.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a WhatsApp announcement for a new product catalogue.
input: The business sells locally made bags. Invite customers to request prices without claiming limited stock.
output: Our new catalogue of locally made bags is now available. It includes everyday totes, work bags, and gift options in different colours. Send us a message with the item name to request the current price and availability.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write an out-of-office message for a small business.
input: The shop is closed for a public holiday and will reopen at 9 a.m. the next day.
output: Thank you for your message. We are closed for the public holiday and will reopen at 9 a.m. tomorrow. We will respond to messages in the order received once business resumes.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a professional restock announcement.
input: Three skincare products are back in stock. Do not make medical claims.
output: Restock update: our gentle cleanser, body lotion, and facial moisturiser are available again. Please send the product name and quantity you need, and we will confirm the current price and delivery options.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a meeting confirmation message.
input: Confirm a supplier meeting for Monday at 11 a.m. at the Surulere shop and ask them to acknowledge.
output: Hello, this is to confirm our supplier meeting for Monday at 11 a.m. at our Surulere shop. Kindly acknowledge this message and let us know in advance if your arrival time changes.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Draft a plain-language payment term for a custom order.
input: A 50% deposit confirms the order, and the balance is due before dispatch. Do not give legal advice.
output: Payment terms: a 50% deposit is required to confirm the custom order and begin work. The remaining balance must be paid before dispatch. Any requested changes to the order will be reviewed and confirmed in writing.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a short local delivery policy.
input: Delivery fees depend on location, and estimated times begin after order confirmation.
output: Local delivery fees are calculated according to the destination and will be confirmed before payment. Estimated delivery times begin after the order and delivery details are confirmed. Delays outside our control will be communicated as soon as possible.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Draft a simple return-policy paragraph for unused fashion items.
input: Returns are requested within seven days and require proof of purchase. State that exclusions should be checked before purchase.
output: Requests to return an unused item should be made within seven days of delivery and must include proof of purchase. The item should remain in its original condition and packaging. Please confirm any product-specific exclusions with us before buying.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a complete order confirmation message.
input: Order is for two Ankara shirts at ₦18,000 each, pickup on Saturday, with ₦20,000 paid and ₦16,000 outstanding.
output: Order confirmed: two Ankara shirts at ₦18,000 each, for a total of ₦36,000. We have received ₦20,000, leaving a balance of ₦16,000. Your pickup is scheduled for Saturday; we will confirm when the shirts are ready.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a service-delay notice for customers.
input: Equipment maintenance will delay printing jobs by one business day.
output: Customer notice: scheduled equipment maintenance will add approximately one business day to current printing timelines. We will contact affected customers directly with updated collection dates. We apologise for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a professional social-media caption for a bakery's weekend orders.
input: Invite orders for meat pies, sausage rolls, and small chops. Orders close Thursday at noon.
output: Planning for the weekend? We are taking orders for freshly prepared meat pies, sausage rolls, and small-chops trays. Please place and confirm your order by noon on Thursday so we can schedule production.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Draft an internal stock-count reminder.
input: Staff must count shelf and storeroom items after closing on Friday and record damaged goods separately.
output: Team reminder: we will conduct stock-taking after closing on Friday. Please count all shelf and storeroom items, record damaged goods separately, and submit your completed count sheet to the supervisor before leaving.

instruction: Write a short vacancy announcement for a shop assistant.
input: The role is based in Yaba. Ask applicants for a CV and short introduction. Do not include discriminatory requirements.
output: We are hiring a shop assistant for our Yaba location. The role involves attending to customers, arranging stock, and keeping basic sales records. Interested applicants should send a CV and a short introduction explaining their relevant experience.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Acknowledge receipt of a business payment professionally.
input: Confirm receipt of ₦85,000 for invoice GL-310 without exposing account details.
output: We confirm receipt of ₦85,000 for invoice GL-310. Thank you for your payment. We have updated our record and will send the related order or service update separately.

instruction: Write a thank-you note to a repeat customer.
input: They have placed their fifth order with the business.
output: Thank you for choosing us again for your fifth order. We genuinely appreciate your continued trust in our small business. We will share the order confirmation and next steps shortly.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Draft a request to participate as a vendor at a community event.
input: The business sells handmade home décor and wants information about fees, space, and setup time.
output: Hello, we would like to apply as a vendor at your upcoming community event. We sell handmade home décor items. Please share the vendor fee, allocated space, setup time, and any participation requirements so we can review them.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review

instruction: Write a first message proposing a partnership with a nearby café.
input: A small bakery wants to supply packaged cookies on a trial basis. Avoid promising sales results.
output: Hello, we run a small bakery nearby and would like to discuss supplying packaged cookies to your café on a trial basis. We can share samples, ingredient information, pricing, and proposed delivery days for your review. Please let us know a convenient time to speak.
source: GaiaLab original draft — pending Nigerian human review
